title: Easter Bunny
description: Adds a giant Easter Bunny that lays survival friendly spawn eggs
body:
Looking for a unique way to obtain animals, pets, and utility mobs for your base? This introduces a single, magical new creature that lets you play the odds for animal companions... or get a gruesome surprise!

🐰 **The Enormous Easter Bunny**

- The Easter Bunny spawns very rarely during the night of a full moon. Catch it if you can!
  
- The Bunny lays Easter Fragments every few minutes. It cannot be bred, making it a valuable asset to have in your world.

✨ **The Easter Egg Gamble**

Collect 9 Easter Fragments to craft an Easter Egg. Using the egg spawns one random creature.

This mod is designed to be easily integrated into any modpack. The loot table is completely configurable, allowing players and modpack creators to easily adjust mob weights, remove threats, or add mobs from other mods to the Easter Egg pool.
